entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop being screened for drought stress genotypes

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water or moisture stress affecting the plant during the early vegetative phase

entities.name: EARLY VEGETATIVE PHASE
entities.description: The specific growth stage of the plant during which drought stress was studied

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil that imposes moisture stress earlier due to water holding capacity

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil that restricts root length at deeper zones but allows prolific superficial root growth

entities.name: WATER HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to retain water, which differs between Alfisol and Vertisol

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the plant roots, which is triggered to increase in depth by moisture deficit

entities.name: DEFOLIATION
entities.description: The loss of leaves resulting from increased moisture stress

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of leaves, which is reduced during defoliation to restrict transpiration

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION LOSSES
entities.description: The loss of water vapor from the plant leaves

entities.name: SHOOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the plant shoot, which is reduced due to decreased leaf area

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The duration to reach maturity, categorized into extra-early, medium, and long duration lines

entities.name: GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT RATE
entities.description: The speed of plant growth, which is faster in early maturing lines as a drought avoidance mechanism

entities.name: DROUGHT AVOIDANCE
entities.description: A mechanism used by plants to avoid the effects of drought stress

entities.name: PRIMARY ROOTS
entities.description: The number of primary roots, which is more dominant in medium-duration genotypes

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand drought stress

entities.name: ICPL 14002
entities.description: A specific medium-duration pigeonpea genotype with dominant primary roots

relationships.description: restricts root length at deeper zone
